scripts.lint:architecture: npm run lint:templ-tags && npm run lint:css-apply && npm run lint:imports
scripts.build: npm run lint:architecture && go run github.com/a-h/templ/cmd/templ generate ./... && npm run vendor:assets && npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned
scripts.verify: npm run build && npx ui8px@latest lint ./... --ignore .manual .project web/static/css/ui8kit && go test ./...
scripts.go: npm run build:css && npm run build:versioned && go run ./cmd/server
